Sagheer Akram Researcher // Builder // Artist

Exploring the intersection of AI, dead-simple code, and messy human ideas. My work lives at the edge of curiosity—where systems breathe and experiments tell stories.

Photography

Visual Reflections.

Captured in the wild. Reflections on light, silence, and the moments between. I slow down time through the lens so I can understand the world's messy beauty.
